svg.title: HopTF model overview
svg.desc: Conceptual overview of HopTF showing protein sequence and gene-associated AlphaGenome memory feeding associative retrieval, which produces a regulatory context vector that conditions training and inference of a cell state transport model.
svg.text: A TF isoform sequence retrieves regulatory context from gene-associated AlphaGenome memory; the retrieved context conditions perturbation response transport.
conditional flow matching in cell state space
SCARF embeds control and perturbed cells
Interpretation: retrieval weights prioritize candidate regulatory contexts for hypothesis generation; they are not validated TF binding sites without external evidence.
